title: Meta releases Muse Spark AI model as it tries to close gap with Google, OpenAI and Anthropic
description: Meta released Muse Spark on Wednesday, its first AI model from the $14.3 billion superintelligence team built to compete with OpenAI and Google. Stock rose 7%, though the model lagged rivals in coding and reasoning tasks.

title: CleanSpark Stock Surges Past $10 on Strong Bitcoin Output and Texas AI Data Center Push
description: LAS VEGAS — CleanSpark Inc. shares climbed more than 5% Thursday to trade around $10.38 as investors cheered the Bitcoin miner's robust March production numbers and accelerating pivot toward artificial intelligence and high-performance computing infrastructure in Texas.

title: Universities of Wisconsin regents cite disputes over AI and other topics in president’s firing
description: Leaders on the board that oversees the Universities of Wisconsin say that the fired president of the system was slow to address pressing issues like artificial intelligence and feared upsetting policymakers, faculty and staff.

title: Labor Secretary to Newsmax: Free AI Course Offered Now
description: Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer told Newsmax on Thursday that the Trump administration is pushing to make workers "proficient and literate in AI" through a federal initiative she described as an easy entry point for Americans worried about how artificial intelligence ...
